hero.name: Enzo Norese
hero.title: Backend Developer & Cloud Architect
hero.description: I design and implement backend architectures on Microsoft Azure, integrating cloud services and artificial intelligence to solve real business problems. Technical lead with experience in recruitment systems, ERP migration, and AI model integration.

about.subtitle: A little bit about who I am
about.bio_1: Computer Engineer with a background in electronics, specialized in backend development and cloud solutions architecture. At TeamWork Capacitación Ltda. in Santiago, I operate as technical lead and solutions architect — designing and building high-impact systems that power real operations.
about.bio_2: I lead two key initiatives: the Softland → Rex+ ERP migration (completed with zero data loss and zero downtime) and the Digital 24/7 Recruiter — an AI-powered mass recruitment agent on Azure serverless, with a cascaded multi-model pipeline (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini) designed to process tens of thousands of applications during peak demand periods like Cyber Day.
about.bio_3: My engineering philosophy — "Augmented Engineering" — positions AI tools as technical capability multipliers, not replacements for sound engineering judgment. My path from electronics technician to cloud architect gives me a broad perspective that spans from hardware diagnostics to modern distributed systems.

jobs.description: De facto technical lead and solutions architect responsible for two high-impact projects. (1) ERP Softland → Rex+ Migration: critical migration completed with zero data loss and no operational disruption, involving deep analysis of legacy data structures, cross-system schema mapping, and exhaustive data integrity validation. (2) Digital 24/7 Recruiter: AI-powered mass recruitment agent on Azure Functions v4 (Premium Plan) with a cascaded multi-model pipeline (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini) for cost-optimized screening. Features async ingestion via Azure Service Bus, PostgreSQL staging schema, Microsoft 365 Graph API, Azure Blob Storage, Azure Document Intelligence for image CVs, WhatsApp OTP, and Google Maps Places API with Haversine distance calculation.

Maintained, debugged, and developed new features for integration APIs built with C# (.NET Core 3.1) and JavaScript (Node.js). Also responsible for maintaining continuous integration and deployment workflows.
Responsible for repairing and maintaining a wide variety of electronic equipment, with specialization in digital cameras and printers.

stories.description: From electronics technician to backend developer and cloud architect — a technical path spanning hardware diagnostics, C#/.NET, and modern Azure cloud systems.

projects.subtitle: A selection of things I've built

items.title: Digital 24/7 Recruiter
items.description: AI-powered mass recruitment agent on Azure serverless. Cascaded multi-model pipeline (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini) for cost-optimized screening, async ingestion via Azure Service Bus, WhatsApp OTP, Azure Document Intelligence for image CVs, and Haversine distance calculation. Built to scale to tens of thousands of applications during peak demand periods.

items.title: ERP Migration: Softland → Rex+
items.description: High-risk enterprise ERP migration completed with zero data loss and no operational disruption. Required deep analysis of legacy data structures, cross-system schema mapping, and exhaustive integrity validation across 5+ years of operational data.

items.title: TypeScript Password Library
items.description: Static class library for password management: secure hashing, verification, random generation, and complexity evaluation. Designed as a drop-in module for Node.js backend services.

items.title: PDF & Image Text Extractor
items.description: REST API that extracts structured text from PDF and image files using Anthropic's Claude API. Built with Express.js and Multer for multipart file handling, enabling document processing workflows.

items.title: Azure SignalR Real-time PoC
items.description: Proof of concept for scalable real-time messaging using Azure SignalR Service with Azure Functions. Demonstrates event-driven WebSocket communication patterns for distributed applications.

items.title: Chilean Job Market Scraper
items.description: Python web scraper covering 6 major Chilean job portals (Bumeran, LinkedIn, Indeed, and others). Aggregates and normalizes job listings across portals for market intelligence and analysis.

contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.description: I'm currently open to new opportunities. Whether you have a project in mind, a question, or just want to say hi — my inbox is always open.
